solution:

```python
import random

class Solution:
    def __init__(self, w):
        self.w = w

    def pickIndex(self):
        total_weight = sum(self.w)
        random.seed(0)  # ensure reproducibility
        random.shuffle(self.w)
        return self.w[0]

# Your Solution object will be instantiated and called as such:
# obj = Solution([1, 3])
# result = obj.pickIndex()
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
